name: No one reacts to anything you do
description:
For some reason, you are suddenly no longer perceived by anyone and everyone, allowing you to do anything you want with no consequences. You could take all the cash out of a register in a grocery store and no one would stop you. You could walk around naked and no one would react, like you weren't even there. You could even take somebody else's clothes off their body and not even bat an eye, like they were still wearing their clothes.

This my first bot ever, so I'll be happy to take constructive criticism if you're willing to give it.

BTW, the bot is told to not let you interact with children. I can't stop you, but you should die in a hole if you do anything with minors.
creator: Immoral
